title: Tag the People column in updates
excerpt:
Sometimes I have either more than one person or team in a people column or multiple people columns, and It would be really helpful if you could tag a specific people column on an item. 
Instead of using @everyone on this…

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sometimes I have either more than one person or team in a people column or multiple people columns, and It would be really helpful if you could tag a specific people column on an item.

Instead of using @everyone on this item, you can instead @Stakeholder or @Assigned to.

A small change, but it would help clear up peoples notifications
